drl:
rule "R0"
salience($b0_0_0)
when
    $p0_0 : T0($b0_0_0 : f0)
then
    insert(new T1($p0_0.getF0(), true));
end
rule "R1"
when
    ( $p1_0 : T1() and not T2(f2 != false) )
    or
    ( $p1_0 : T1() and not T2(f0 contains "l") )
    or
    ( $p1_0 : T1() and not T2(f2 != false) )
then
    insertLogical(new T2("ab", $p1_0.getF0(), $p1_0.isF1()));
end
rule "R2"
when
    T1(f0 > 4.0, $b2_0_0 : f0, $b2_0_1 : f1)
then
    insertLogical(new T2("beta", 3.0, $b2_0_1));
end
rule "R3"
when
    $p3_0 : T1(f1 == false)
then
    modify($p3_0) { setF1(true) }
end
rule "R4"
when
    T0(f0 <= 5.5, $b4_0_0 : f0)
then
    insert(new T1($b4_0_0, false));
    insertLogical(new T2("beta", $b4_0_0, true));
end
rule "R5"
when
    (or (and $p5_0 : T1() not T2(f2 != false)) (and $p5_0 : T1() not T2(f0 < "b")))
then
    insertLogical(new T2("ab", $p5_0.getF0(), $p5_0.isF1()));
end
